scope.summary: Desugar Oracle proxy username shorthand at config load into typed proxy authentication and show the explicit proxy shape in setup output.
out_of_scope: Live Oracle authentication with a field profile.

entry_points.name: configuration loader and typed connection options
entry_points.trace: scripts/swarm_discipline.sh bounded-run --timeout 120 -- env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp-target/ws-b-b8c-evidence cargo test -p oraclemcp-config proxy_bracket and cargo test -p oraclemcp-core proxy_bracket_username_reaches_typed_connect_options: 3 config tests and 1 core test passed in the dedicated clean worktree at 13a7e6fe4848b84efd9c6ab38eb25a52ba798f20. They prove desugaring, quoted-identifier preservation, malformed/dual-form refusal, and typed proxy connection options.

entry_points.name: setup templates and config-ops write path
entry_points.trace: scripts/swarm_discipline.sh bounded-run --timeout 120 -- env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp-target/ws-b-b8c-evidence cargo test -p oraclemcp setup_payload_is_generic_and_client_ready and cargo test -p oraclemcp --test cli setup_write_round_trips_profiles_through_config_ops: 1 passed each in the clean worktree at 13a7e6fe4848b84efd9c6ab38eb25a52ba798f20. The generated setup shape exposes [profiles.proxy_auth] without leaking credentials.

limitations: No live Oracle proxy authentication was run; this evidence covers config and typed-connect construction only.
